understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile ('+') by using horizontal moves and clicking to remove breakable blocks, while avoiding spike hazards and managing turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is restricted to horizontal directions (left/right), and after each move, gravity automatically moves the player in its current direction until landing on a solid or safe tile, reaching the goal, or hitting a hazard. Clicking removes breakable blocks, which can open new gravity paths, and undo reverts previous actions. Hazards like spikes cause instant failure if landed upon.
